sections.paragraph:
οἰϰοδομέω [οἰκοδόμος; ‘build’]

—1. ‘erect a structure’

—a. build, of var. types of structures Mt 7:24, 26; 23:29; Mk 12:1; Lk 6:48; 12:18; 1 Pt 2:7. —By ext., of transcendent entities, such as Christ’s ἐκκλησία Mt 16:18; sim. 1 Pt 2:5.

—b. with focus on restoration of structures build up Mt 27:40; Mk 15:29.

—2. in imagery of building viewed as process or result, w. focus on growth and development build up Ac 9:31; 20:32; 1 Cor 8:1, 10 (in irony); 10:23; 14:4, 17; 1 Th 5:11.
